svg.title: Three Stations — Chunky, Built, Belongs in the World
svg.desc: Stations drawn like asteroids: solid filled shapes, bumpy edges, full opacity. Heavy plate metal. The ring is thick welded segments, not a perfect circle. Modules are chunky masses, not icons. Same visual weight as the rocks around them.
svg.text: Solid filled polygons. Same rendering approach as asteroids. Belongs in the world.
